title: Automate Validation Test Case
description: Schema for Automate stack validation test cases. Field names mirror the column headers in Automate5_Test_Cases.xlsx (sheet 'Automate5_Test_Cases'), snake-cased.

test_case_id.description: Unique test identifier. Format: TC-<PREFIX>-<NN[N]> (e.g., TC-FPGA-001, TC-HW-05).

owner.description: Person or pair responsible for the test.

component.description: Functional area being validated (e.g., 'MIPI Camera Input').

dependency.description: List of test_case_ids that must pass before this test can run.

precondition.description: Required setup or hardware state before running the test.

test_name.description: Short descriptive name for the test.

steps.description: Ordered list of action strings to execute the test.

severity.description: Severity if the test fails (e.g., Critical, Major, Minor).

automation_readiness.description: How automatable the test is (e.g., Automatable, Semi-Automatable, Manual).

automation_status.description: Current automation implementation status (e.g., Ready, Not Ready, In Progress).

observations.description: Free-form notes or context about the test.

next_action_if_fail.description: Suggested triage / debug step if the test fails.
